block_00: 🎂Grand drawing in honor of the company's birthday is today!

block_06: We’d like to remind you that on the 7th of December the grand drawing in honor of the company's birthday will be held! You could win a share of the $10,000 prize pool!
block_09: Trade options on the real balance and reach at least a $10 turnover.
block_10: Receive one ticket for every round of a $10 turnover. The more tickets you get, the higher the odds for being the lucky winner of the prize.
block_11: The winning ticket will be selected at random on December 7 at 5 pm UTC.
block_12: The results of the draw will be sent to you along with a screencast.
block_13: All of your tickets will be eligible for the grand drawing, except those tickets that have already won.
block_14: The winner will receive the prize amount on the trading balance on the same day before 10 pm UTC.
block_15: On December 7 at 7 am UTC we will stop generating new tickets. So hurry up, trade now and earn more tickets to increase your chances of winning.
block_17: 100 tickets of $100 are waiting for you! Best of luck! 🍀
